name: Idiyappam Recipe | Nool Puttu (String Hoppers)

steps.instruction: Lightly roast rice flour on low heat for 4-5 minutes till steam appears. Cool slightly.
Boil water with salt. Add hot water to roasted rice flour and mix.
Knead to smooth soft dough while still warm. Adjust with warm water or flour if needed.
Grease idli plates or banana leaves. Press dough using idiyappam press in concentric circles.
Sprinkle grated coconut on top (optional). Steam for 9-10 minutes.
Rest for 1-2 minutes, then remove carefully and serve.

tips: Keep unused dough covered to prevent drying.
Steam only 8-10 minutes to avoid dryness.
Place in casserole if not serving immediately.
variations: Serve with sweetened coconut milk and jaggery for kids.
Make Semiya Upma or Payasam with leftovers.
